name: Chicken Broccoli Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Cooked Brown Rice (May Be Substituted For Bulgur)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine bulgur and 2/3 cup boiling water in a large bowl; let stand for 30 to 45 minutes or until liquid is absorbed. Set aside.
2. In a medium saucepan, combine bouillon granules, garlic, and remaining 2 cups boiling water. Bring to a boil over high heat; add chicken. Cover, reduce heat, and simmer for 20 minutes or until chicken is tender. Remove chicken and let cool. Discard broth.
3. Bone the chicken and cut into bite-size pieces. Combine with reserved bulgur.
4. Steam broccoli for 5 minutes or until crisp-tender. Add to chicken mixture. Stir in green onions, lime juice, pepper, crushed red pepper flakes, and gingerroot.
5. Cover and chill for 2 to 3 hours.
